---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way?

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, links to how other readers (Komga/Kavita/etc.) handle it, or anything
else useful.
